scripts.validate: npm run skill:validate && npm run content:validate
scripts.lint: npm --workspace tooling run lint && npm --workspace site run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace tooling run typecheck && npm --workspace site run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace tooling run test && npm --workspace site run test
scripts.build: npm run content:build && npm --workspace site run build
scripts.dev: npm run content:build && npm --workspace site run dev
